name: Chip Englander
subject: Rand Paul for President Weekly Newsletter 8/08
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Rand Paul For President
body:
| | |
---
| | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605912:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)
---
| |
---
**Saturday, August 8th, 2015**

At the GOP debate on Thursday, Senator Paul showed everyone why he is the best candidate to restore America's constitutional principles. Supporters from across the country got involved by hosting debate watch parties and sharing pictures of themselves with the [#StandWithRand](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605913:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r) hashtag. Our message of opportunity and liberty is resonating with people who are ready to unleash the American dream.

The polls continue to show that Senator Paul has a unique advantage over Hillary Clinton in competitive states, including a 2 point lead in New Hampshire. As the nominee and the next president, Rand will make the Republican Party bigger, better, and bolder. Stay tuned for more updates in next week's newsletter.

Chip Englander
Campaign Manager
Rand Paul for President
| | |
## News of the Week
---
| | |
### Senator Paul hits a 'Rand Slam' in Cleveland
In Thursday's debate, Senator Paul stood up for conservative principles and was not afraid to shake things up, while also offering substantive solutions and policies. The Senator proved he's a Constitutional conservative who will defend the entire Bill of Rights.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605914:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)
---
|
### In GOP Debate, Paul Goes on Offense
Donald Trump may have wanted to avoid a fight in the first Republican presidential primary debate of the season. But Rand Paul had other ideas. The Kentucky Senator, reeling from a series of negative press coverage about the state of his slumping campaign, burst out of the gate at the top of the two-hour nationally televised event Thursday night to take a shot at The Donald.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605915:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)
---
|
### Rand Paul Polls Better than Hillary Clinton in 'Live Free or Die' State
Sen. Rand Paul has been consistent in the polls, and recently beat Hillary Clinton in several key swing states, according to the Quinnipiac University poll. Recent polls such as the McClatchy poll, the Fox News Presidential poll and the Wall Street Journal/ NBC News poll also found that Sen. Paul is the Republican candidate most likely to beat Hillary Clinton in 2016 general election.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605916:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)
---
| |
---
|

---
[ ](www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q4f68nn812Y)
### "First Debate Highlights"
Rand Paul won the first GOP debate in Cleveland by distinguishing himself as a different kind of Republican -- one who will defeat Hillary and defend the entire Bill of Rights.

### Stand with Rand in New Hampshire!
Senator Paul will be making a 3-day trip through southern New Hampshire this week, beginning in Manchester on Tuesday. Come join him for a town hall or a meet and greet!

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605918:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)
---
|
|
## Volunteer of the Week
---
| |
### Steve Sukup
#### Iowa
Steve is a former member of the Iowa State House and a leader in Iowa's agriculture industry. He supports Senator Paul because of his principled stances on limited government, individual responsibility, and a fair tax system.

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29605919:28392901608:m:1:879035888:FCA01208106D578E042DE21B36DC5BAD:r)

#### $18.00

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: Trump Wins 1st in GOP Debate!
body:
Trump - Make America Great Again!
| |
---
| | [](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-r/)
---

| |
---
[www.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-y/)
| |
---
\- August 07 2015 -
Trump Wins 1st in GOP Debate!

| Dear Peter Willis, Have you seen the polls? After last night's debate we have [more support](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-j/) than [any other candidate](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-t/). We are number one in many states including [Georgia](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-i/), [Arizona](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-d/), [New Hampshire](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-h/), and [Florida](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-k/). Tomorrow I'll be at the RedState Gathering in Georgia ([RSVP here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-u/)). Next week I'll be in [Michigan](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-o/), New Hampshire, and Iowa. We are proud of our performance - but this is just the first of many times we will stand up to the lifetime politicians and out of touch pundits who think they know what is best for normal Americans. They don't. I am the only candidate who will **Make America Great Again.** We want every member of #TeamTrump to show that they #StandWithTrump. **Additionally, we are very excited to celebrate the launch of our online store located at**[Shop.DonaldJTrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-b/)**.** We want to see [#TeamTrump](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-n/) all over America. Tag us [@RealDonaldTrump](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-fzuiit-drdiuiutjh-p/) and show us your campaign gear!
---

Donald J. Trump

[Forward to a friend](http://donaldtrumpcampaign.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-drdiuiutjh-E524705E-fzuiit-l-a)

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.
[info@donaldtrump.com](mailto:info@donaldtrump.com)
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: Critical time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Despite less than five minutes in total speaking time Thursday night, the American people saw what my campaign is all about during that all-important debate.

This campaign is about doing whatever it takes to finally dismantle and destroy the entire Washington Machine that's destroying the precious freedoms our founders handed down to us.

And I'm not backing down in the face of attacks from anyone.

But Fellow Conservative, I need your action to help me bring my vision to every town and city in America.

**[Will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617700:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)**?

This is a critical time. Many Americans just start zeroing in on the campaign for President with the launch of the presidential debates.

So your support today is critical.

The truth is, I don't believe the media can silence you and me -- no matter how hard they try.

Every time the media or Big Government apologists in BOTH parties have tried to destroy the liberty movement over the past few years, we've only gotten stronger.

More Americans keep flocking to our message of liberty and limited government as we call out Washington, D.C.'s spending and spying and outrageous assaults on our Bill of Rights.

They're ready for a President who will FIGHT to:

*** CUT TAXES AND SPENDING. My Fair and Flat Tax plan will blow up the tax code and start over, return $2 TRILLION to the American people over ten years, grow our GDP by a whopping 10%, and result in at least 1.4 million new jobs;

*** PASS TERM LIMITS to end the reign of career politicians in Washington, D.C.;

*** FORCE MEMBERS OF CONGRESS TO READ THE BILLS THEY VOTE ON, and stop their habit of ramming thousand-page bills into law at the last minute before anyone knows what's in them;

*** REPEAL ALL OF OBAMACARE to stop the soaring health insurance premium costs, policy cancellations, shuttered hospitals, and poorer quality healthcare Americans are now experiencing;

*** AUDIT THE FEDERAL RESERVE to end the "print-now, ask-questions-later" policies that result in never-ending boom-bust economic cycles, corruption, and cronyism;

*** PROTECT THE ENTIRE BILL OF RIGHTS. That means protecting our religious liberties, political speech, gun rights, and our Fourth Amendment right to privacy from government spying.

Fellow Conservative, I'm going to ensure our message grows louder and louder.

But I'm counting on your support.

**[Please agree to your most generous contribution of $20.16 TODAY](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617700:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)**!

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617701:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617702:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617703:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617704:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617700:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617700:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617705:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617706:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29617707:28402544209:m:1:879035888:BE4FEBDFD85D0AD755C70524A250C66B:r)

name: Elect Katie
subject: Easy way to show your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

Katie McGinty is running to become Pennsylvania's next U.S. Senator!

All eyes are going to be on Katie's first steps as a candidate, so it's critical that we help Katie come out of the gates as strong as possible. From now on, every grassroots supporter who joins our team helps us get that much closer to electing Katie as Pennsylvania's first woman senator.

As one of our founding supporters, you're an essential part of building a winning campaign. But the work doesn't end there.

**Will you let your friends and neighbors know that you 're ready to elect Katie, a champion for hardworking Pennsylvania families?** Every voice we add to this campaign makes us that much stronger.

[**Share this graphic on Facebook to spread the word about why you 're supporting Katie for 2016.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4318880475608252416/7750151799960502272)

| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4318880475608252416/7750151799960502272)
---
(_Not on Facebook? Not a problem! Just forward this email to three friends and fill them in on why you support Katie as Pennsylvania 's next U.S. Senator._)

Electing Katie is going to take everything we've got.

Thank you for being a part of this,

The entire McGinty team
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4318880475608252416/7822209393998430208?refcode=20150808e&amount=5)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-4318880475608252416/7678094205922574336).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Jeb Bush Jr.
subject: Jeb KILLED it!
body:
**Friend**
**Debate Response Fund:****Pending**
**10 Hours Left**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/kmrkwrpqfsvjtztljrgkfjbzppjbqzwqkrdrvqzlhdvh_idnmmzcg.html)

Friend,

We're just 10 hours left until our midnight deadline and we're still short.

Dad crushed the debate on Thursday, but to keep this momentum going, we need your help.

[**Will you rush your donation of $50, $25, or even $10 to our emergency Debate Response Fund right now to make sure my dad has the resources he needs to win?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hbbrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdvqhcb_idnmmzcg.html)

Remember, the campaign will send you a limited edition Jeb! Lapel Pin with every contribution before midnight tonight, but only if you step up and chip in now: [**Jeb2016.com/Debate-Response-Fund**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/jjrhctnkfmvwspsbwtdhfwzpnnwzkpckhtqtvkpbrqvt_idnmmzcg.html)

Friend, my dad needs you right now. **This is a crucial deadline and we need to activate 5,000 grassroots supporters by midnight tonight for our Debate Response Fund.**

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/uwhbvgckmfnsyjyhsgdbmszjccszkjvkbgpgnkjhqpnn_idnmmzcg.html)

These next few months are critical to the campaign. We can't let up this momentum now. Please, Friend, I'm asking one final time, chip in to our Debate Response Fund right now: [**Jeb2016.com/Debate-Response-Fund**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/eydljtqwphbfdcdrftklpfvcqqfvwcjwltztbwcrszbh_idnmmzcg.html)

Thank you,

Jeb Jr.

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pqvtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkghqcmc_idnmmzcg.html)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=2921&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)
